chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-103 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026. M/s Arshad Ali Keerio and Ghulam Murtaza Keerio, Advocates for Petitioner. Mr. Zaheeruddin Sahito, Advocate for Respondent No.2 to 6. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Deputy Attorney General alongwith Faizullah Dahri (CEO HESCO), Aijaz A.Shaikh (COO HESCO), Shaikh Ejaz Ahmed (Chief Engineer HESCO) and Tanveer Abdullah (Chief Law Officer HESCO). ***************************************** Pursuant to the Court orders, Chief Executive Officer of HESCO alongwith Aijaz A.Shaikh (COO HESCO), Shaikh Ejaz Ahmed (Chief Engineer HESCO) and Tanveer Abdullah (Chief Law Officer HESCO) is present and submits that the electricity supply of the houses situated in village Abdullah Halepoto, P.O Talhar, District Badin has been restored after repairing the main supply. In view of the above submissions made by the HESCO, when confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner expresses satisfaction to the extent of prayer clause “A” and “B” and he further submits that for redressal of electricity bills adjustment having consumer I.D No.1370209072, Petitioner intends to approach the Electricity Inspector and seeks disposal of the Petition. Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
